verbatim_prompt: A browser-style tab in an HTTP client's tab strip grows wider with its title instead of staying a fixed width — a long title stretches the tab across the strip and pushes the new-tab (+) button. Desired: each tab has a max-width with white-space:nowrap + text-overflow:ellipsis and does NOT reflow or grow with title length — long titles truncate to an ellipsis, tab width stays stable, the + button stays in place. Zero behaviour change: tab select/close/reorder, the dirty dot, the method chip, active-tab styling all stay; this is a pure CSS/layout constraint on the tab title. Scope: the TabBar / tab-strip (specs/002-tabs-primitive, specs/005-tab-bar-visual-fidelity), NOT the RequestBar. Visual fidelity is MANDATORY: design/reference.html is the VISUAL TARGET to match to pixel parity, and the exact resolved values are pre-extracted in design/styles.css and design/design-fidelity-contract.md (section 'Tab strip' — notably .tab max-width 220px and .tab-label white-space:nowrap/overflow:hidden/text-overflow:ellipsis, plus tab padding/gap/height) — use those exact computed-style values as the fidelity AC targets, treating var(--token) as resolves-to-token (not a literal hex). Copy the VALUES, never the CODE: the export carries generated cruft (data-om-* attributes, __OmT wrappers, inline styles, a tweaks-panel) that must NOT enter the build — rebuild with semantic class names bound to design/tokens.json. unchanged_behaviour: tab select/close/reorder, dirty dot, method chip, active styling, title text content (only overflow rendering changes); tests stay green.

symptom.value: TabBar tabs flex-grow with their title text: a long title stretches the tab across the strip and pushes the new-tab (+) button. Tabs should hold a fixed max-width and ellipsis-truncate; tab width must stay stable and the + button stay anchored.

affected_area.value: Tab strip rendered by TabBar.tsx (organisms) via the shared <Tabs> molecule (molecules/Tabs.tsx). Tab button + label markup and base width CSS live in molecules/Tabs.css (.tabs/.tab/.tab-label); .tabbar-scoped overrides in organisms/TabBar.css. Title text derived in TabBar.tsx deriveLabel -> toDescriptor. Note: Tabs.css is the SHARED molecule base — other (currently non-mounted) consumers also use it.

repro_or_current.value: Open the request tab strip. A tab title comes from deriveLabel (method + URL/name) via toDescriptor. As soon as a title exceeds the cell's content width, the .tabbar .tabs__tab-wrapper cell grows with the title (no max-width; inherits flex-shrink:0; tablist is content-width via .tabbar .tabs__list flex:0 0 auto). The widening tab consumes strip space and pushes the +/spacer/overflow-chevron actions to the right; multiple long titles overflow the strip. Any title past the cell width grows the tab — no threshold.

desired.value: Cap the tab cell so it never grows with title length and long titles truncate with an ellipsis. Concretely: add max-width:220px to .tabbar .tabs__tab-wrapper (the design's .tab equivalent), matching design-fidelity-contract section 5. The .tabs__tab-label ellipsis machinery (white-space:nowrap + overflow:hidden + text-overflow:ellipsis + flex:1) is already present and fires once the cap exists; the button already has min-width:0 + flex:1 1 auto. Tab width stays stable; +/spacer/overflow-chevron actions stay anchored. Computed-style fidelity AC targets per contract: wrapper max-width resolves 220px, padding 0 10px 0 12px, gap 8px, tab bar height 36px; var(--token) asserted as resolves-to-token (not literal hex).

unchanged_behavior.value: No behaviour change: tab select / close / reorder, the dirty dot, the method chip, active-tab styling, and the title text content itself stay identical — only overflow RENDERING changes (long title now ellipsis-truncates instead of growing the tab). Fix is .tabbar-scoped so bare .tabs consumers (section tabs, PrimitivesDemo) are untouched. All existing TabBar/Tabs unit + CT tests stay green; no JS/markup change.

gaps.description: Confirm at runtime (Playwright CT computed-style or Chrome DevTools) that the relocated cell-level cap actually halts tab growth and fires the label ellipsis under the real .tabbar cascade — the grill seed flagged the CT harness not loading tokens.css, so the cascade must be proven before finalizing.

Confirm at runtime (Playwright CT computed-style or Chrome DevTools) that the relocated cell-level cap actually halts tab growth and fires the label ellipsis under the real .tabbar cascade — the grill seed flagged the CT harness not loading tokens.css, so the cascade must be proven before finalizing.

intake_classifications.statement: TabBar tabs flex-grow with title length, stretching the strip and pushing the + button; they should hold a fixed max-width and ellipsis-truncate long titles (nowrap+overflow), tab width stable, + button anchored — matching design reference to pixel parity, zero behaviour change to select/close/reorder/dirty-dot/method-chip/active styling.
intake_classifications.minimal_fix: Constrain the tab element so it does not flex-grow: add max-width (per design contract — .tab 220px) and prevent flex-grow, and on the title/.tab-label apply white-space:nowrap + overflow:hidden + text-overflow:ellipsis. Bind to design/tokens.json values via semantic class names; do not import the export's generated cruft. No JS/behaviour changes.
